name: IntendedUse
title: Intended Use
description: Indicates how the EHR is to use the information with respect to the associated orders/records.  If the Adaptive QuestionnaireResponse includes a prior authorization number the `intendedUse` element should be set to 'retain-doc' and/or 'withorder'.

element.definition: Indicates how the EHR is to use the information with respect to the associated orders/records.  If the Adaptive QuestionnaireResponse includes a prior authorization number the `intendedUse` element should be set to 'retain-doc' and/or 'withorder'.

element.short: Reference to the pertinent order associated with this QuestionnaireResponse.
element.definition: This contains references to the pertinent orders associated with this QuestionnaireResponse.
